$properties.Source:
local Players = game:GetService("Players")

local CmdrMax = require("./CmdrMax")
CmdrMax.RegisterDefaultCommands()

CmdrMax.SetRolePermissions("admin", { "a", "b", "c" })

CmdrMax.AddCommand("helloworld", {
	Description = "Testing",
	Args = {},
	Permissions = { "a" },
	
	Run = function(context)
		return "Hello world!"
	end,
})

Players.PlayerAdded:Connect(function(plr)
	CmdrMax.GiveRole(plr, "admin")
end)
